title: This, That, These, Those
description: The /ð/ sound (voiced TH) in the four demonstratives. Rafa points at his menu and Maya catches every 'dis' that should be 'this'.
summary_pt_br: O som /ð/ (TH vibrado, COM voz) nos demonstrativos THIS / THAT / THESE / THOSE. A diferença entre 'dis' (errado) e 'this' (correto) — com dica de vibração na garganta.

scenes.subtitle_en: The voiced TH — the one with a hum
scenes.subtitle_pt: O TH vibrado — o que faz a garganta zumbir

scenes.text_en:
Rafa pointed. 'Dis is a taco. Dat is a drink.'
Maya winced and gave him a wink.
'Not DIS and DAT. It's THIS and THAT.
Put your hand on your throat. Feel it HUM like that.'
scenes.text_pt:
O Rafa apontou. 'Dis is a taco. Dat is a drink.'
Maya estremeceu e piscou num clique.
'Não é DIS nem DAT. É THIS e THAT.
Bote a mão no pescoço. Sinta o ZUM-ZUM, tá?'

scenes.title: The /ð/ sound — voiced TH
scenes.body_en: Same tongue position as /θ/ (tongue between teeth), BUT this time you USE your voice. Put your hand on your throat — you should feel it vibrate. /ð/ is the sound in THIS, THAT, THESE, THOSE, THE, THEY, MOTHER, BROTHER, WITH, BATHE.
scenes.body_pt: Mesma posição de língua que o /θ/ (entre os dentes), MAS agora COM voz. Bote a mão no pescoço — tem que vibrar. /ð/ aparece em THIS, THAT, THESE, THOSE, THE, THEY, MOTHER, BROTHER, WITH, BATHE.

scenes.text_en:
THIS is close. THAT is far.
THESE are many, near where you are.
THOSE are many, out of reach.
Four little words. That's what we teach.
scenes.text_pt:
THIS é perto. THAT é longe.
THESE é muito perto — coisa até que te emponha.
THOSE é muito longe, fora do alcance.
Quatro palavrinhas. É tudo neste trance.

exercise.question: Rafa points at ONE taco in his hand. Which word?
exercise.explanation: ONE + CLOSE = THIS. He's holding it in his own hand — singular, near.

exercise.question: Bia points at SURFBOARDS on the FAR side of the beach. Which word?
exercise.explanation: MANY + FAR = THOSE. Multiple surfboards, far away.

turns.en: THOSE are corn tortillas, over there.
turns.pt: AQUELES são tortilhas de milho, lá longe.

exercise.question: Complete the song line: '___ is me.' (from The Greatest Showman)
exercise.explanation: 'This Is Me' — one of the most famous TH-voiced lines in modern pop. Practice the HUM.
exercise.hint_pt_br: 'This Is Me' — uma das linhas mais famosas com /ð/ no pop recente.

scenes.text_en:
Listen for /ð/ in songs today.
It hides in THE and THEY and THEY SAY.
Every time you hear a gentle HUM,
That's the voiced TH — feel it on your thumb!
scenes.text_pt:
Escute o /ð/ nas músicas, tô falando sério.
Ele se esconde em THE, em THEY, em mistério.
Sempre que ouvir um zumbidinho leve,
É o TH vibrado — sente o dedo que se atreve!

exercise.explanation: A 2x2 grid: near/far × singular/plural. Once you see it, you never forget it.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Grade 2x2: perto/longe × singular/plural. Memorize a grade, resolve a vida.

exercise.question: Which THREE have /ð/ (voiced TH)?
exercise.explanation: THIS / THAT / THEY all start with the VOICED /ð/ (you feel vibration). The other groups are /θ/ (just air, no voice).
exercise.hint_pt_br: THIS / THAT / THEY começam com /ð/ — vibra. Os outros grupos são /θ/ — só ar.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome. Can I help you find something?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes. How much is this shirt?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Those pants are on sale for thirty.
turns.pt: Aquelas calças estão em promoção, trinta.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I will try these pants, please.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Sure. The fitting room is that way.
turns.pt: Claro. O provador é por ali.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I will take this shirt too.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. That will be seventy dollars.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "This, That, These, Those". The /ð/ sound (voiced TH) in the four demonstratives. Rafa points at his menu and Maya catches every 'dis' that should be 'this'. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "This, That, These, Those". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'This, That, These, Those'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "This, That, These, Those".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: British Council · A1
